batch: Batch150 — P0/P1 to P2 Transition Gate & External Closure Guide
phase: P0/P1 source/local relaxation for starting P2 work, while hosted/public proof remains a hard external gate
purpose: Solve the hardest remaining internal problem before moving to P2: make the transition decision explicit, machine-readable, and impossible to overclaim. Batch150 separates what may be relaxed for local P2 development from what remains blocked for public rollout: GitHub Actions Node24, real Vercel APP_URL, real PNG visual smoke, hosted save/export HTTPS, and production DB/security/legal review.

scope.singleBatchScope: P0/P1 to P2 transition decision gate and external closure operator guide only

localP2DevelopmentMayStartWhen: Current guarded build artifact is ready, live:smoke passes, loopback hosted-style smoke passes, and P1 security report passes; or Batch149 max-closure report already captured the same local closure candidate
P2 work stays source/local/private and does not open public rollout, payment, AI, marketplace, or auto-public community
publicP2OrPublicRolloutBlockedUntil: GitHub Actions Node24 run with CI provenance passes
APP_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL/GIAOAN_DEMO_URL point to the same real HTTPS Vercel URL
Hosted save/export smoke passes through HTTPS
Real visual smoke screenshots exist as PNG files for canonical viewports
Downloaded artifact set from one GitHub Actions run passes closure dossier and authenticity lock
Production DB/session/security/legal review is completed before any production-ready claim
allowedClaimsAfterLocalPass: P0/P1 local/source/runtime can be relaxed enough to begin P2 source work
P2 can start behind private/local gate, still no public rollout
Hosted/public proof remains blocked until external evidence is supplied
forbiddenClaimsUntilExternalPass: visual smoke passed without PNG screenshots
Node24 CI proof from a local Node22 run

localTransitionRequired.label: Current P0/P1 local/source/runtime closure evidence or Batch149 max-closure report
localTransitionRequired.command: GIAOAN_SKIP_REDUNDANT_NEXT_BUILD_CHECKS=1 GIAOAN_BUILD_TRACE_GRACE_MS=0 GIAOAN_BUILD_ARTIFACT_READY_GRACE_MS=0 npm run build && npm run live:smoke && npm run runtime:p0-loopback-url-smoke

localTransitionRequired.label: P0/P1 final closure board shows local closure candidate
localTransitionRequired.reasonOptional: Batch149 report is the stronger latest local max-closure artifact; this board is preserved as supporting evidence.

externalHardBlockers.label: GitHub Actions Node24 provenance
externalHardBlockers.whyHard: Local Node22/ChatGPT container cannot prove the production CI contract.
externalHardBlockers.command: Run the P0 Hosted Final Proof workflow in GitHub Actions with strict=true.

externalHardBlockers.label: Real Vercel HTTPS APP_URL
externalHardBlockers.whyHard: A real public URL must exist outside the repository.
externalHardBlockers.command: Set workflow input app_url or secret GIAOAN_DEMO_URL to https://<your-vercel-domain>.
externalHardBlockers.evidence: APP_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL and GIAOAN_DEMO_URL resolve to the same non-local HTTPS origin.

externalHardBlockers.label: Hosted save/export smoke over HTTPS
externalHardBlockers.whyHard: Loopback smoke is strong but does not prove public network/session behavior.
externalHardBlockers.command: APP_URL=https://<vercel-url> NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://<vercel-url> GIAOAN_DEMO_URL=https://<vercel-url> npm run verify:p0-hosted-ci-proof
externalHardBlockers.evidence: runtime-p0-hosted-ci-final-proof-report-last-run.json and runner artifacts show all hosted checks pass.

externalHardBlockers.label: Real browser visual smoke PNGs
externalHardBlockers.whyHard: Screenshots must be produced by Chromium against the hosted URL.
externalHardBlockers.command: APP_URL=https://<vercel-url> npm run visual:smoke:evidence-capture && npm run visual:smoke:evidence-validate
externalHardBlockers.evidence: artifacts/visual-smoke/**/*.png exists and authenticity lock passes screenshot inventory.

externalHardBlockers.label: Downloaded single GitHub Actions artifact set
externalHardBlockers.whyHard: Artifacts must come from one real run, not mixed local/stale files.
externalHardBlockers.command: Download p0-hosted-final-proof-artifacts from GitHub Actions and validate with closure dossier + authenticity lock.
externalHardBlockers.evidence: p0-hosted-proof-closure-dossier and p0-hosted-proof-authenticity-lock pass in strict mode.

externalHardBlockers.label: Production DB, security and legal review
externalHardBlockers.whyHard: JSON fallback/local smoke does not prove production data protection, legal, or school/user obligations.
externalHardBlockers.command: Complete production DB/session/security/legal checklist before any public or production-ready claim.
externalHardBlockers.evidence: A signed/reviewed production-readiness dossier outside source-level checks.

hostedProofCommands: Deploy/import the repo on Vercel with Node 24.
Open GitHub > Actions > P0 Hosted Final Proof > Run workflow.
Set app_url to https://<your-vercel-domain> and strict=true.
Run npm run p0:hosted-proof-closure-dossier:strict and npm run p0:hosted-proof-authenticity-lock:strict against that artifact set.
Run npm run p0-p1:to-p2-transition-gate again and confirm externalHardBlockersRemaining is empty before public rollout.
